response:
Subject: Thank You for Your Support  

Dear Mr. Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response. I wanted to express my appreciation for the assistance provided.  

Regarding the current machine vision system, I would like to clarify that the device in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C. The image sensor used in this device is the Sony IMX172, and not the e2V sensor as previously mentioned.  

I have attached the technical data to this email for your reference. Please find the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file for detailed specifications and the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, specifically page 13, for quantum efficiency information.  

I will review these files and manuals more carefully and get back to you with my findings.  

Thank you again for your support.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
